query:
ALTER TABLE company_settings 
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS marketingCompanyName VARCHAR(255),
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS marketingEmail VARCHAR(255),
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS marketingAddress TEXT,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS marketingPhone VARCHAR(50),
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS marketingWebsite VARCHAR(500);
